case_title: DELGADO, AMADOR vs. RICHARDSON, GREGORY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, GREGORY DYNASTY EXPRESS DBA GENERAL RENT A CAR

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELGADO, AMADOR AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, GREGORY GENERAL RENT-A-CAR, AKA DOLLAR RENT A CAR DYNASTY EXPRESS DBA GENERAL RENT A CAR SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-05-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-16-1994

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELGADO, AMADOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, GREGORY GENERAL RENT-A-CAR, AKA DOLLAR RENT A CAR $2,494.83 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,494.83
